evals.expected_output: A clean daily card with Today's Meals, Today's Workout, Today's Habits sections. Under 200 words. Ends with a one-line log prompt. Correct day and workout session for today (Tuesday = Lower Body + KneesOverToes).

Full daily card triggered by workout question. Shows correct session for today with exercises and sets/reps. Includes meals and habits even though only workout was asked — skill produces the full card.
Mobility day card. Workout section shows mobility stretches not gym exercises. Meals shown. Habits shown. Under 200 words.
